description: Classic tapering loafers from provogue for men with a refined, stacked heel. The slim, sleek silhouetting on this stylish shoe with appropriate stitch detailing gives this an elegant profile. Style this with tonal, flat front trousers, a blazer and a crisp shirt. Upper Genuine leather upper with reinforced overlay on the heel Aggressive stitch detailing on the overlay seams on the forefoot Slip on styling with elasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for ease of wearability One strap across the midfoot with steel links on top Soft sockliner for instep comfort Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with a stacked heel Textured two-toned honey comb pattened grooves on the forefoot and heel for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
